articles.description: Bitcoin price is up over 8% and trading above the $67,500 resistance. BTC is eyeing a new all-time high and could even hit the $70,000 level. There is a connecting bullish trend line forming with support at $66,000 on the hourly chart of the BTC/USD pair...
